(`true`) * **`context.initializer.classes`**: 애플리케이션 컨텍스트 초기화 시 `ApplicationContextVaultInitializer`를 사용하여 Vault로부터 설정을 로드합니다. ## Monitoring Affiliate Gateway API는 운영 환경에서의 안정성과 성능 관리를 위해 다음과 같은 모니터링 기능을 제공합니다. * **Prometheus Metrics**: `application.yaml` 설정을 통해 Prometheus가 수집할 수 있는 메트릭을 노출합니다. 이를 통해 API의 요청 처리량, 지연 시간, 오류율 등의 핵심 지표를 실시간으로 모니터링할 수 있습니다. * **Actuator Endpoints**: `management.server.port`(`8181`)를 통해 Health Check, Metrics 등 다양한 Actuator 엔드포인트를 제공하여 애플리케이션의 상태를 진단하고 관리할 수 있습니다. ## Source Files 본 문서는 다음 소스 파일들을 기반으로 작성되었습니다. * `affiliate-gateway/affiliate-gateway-api/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/gateway/api/AffiliateGatewayApiApplication.java` * `affiliate-gateway/affiliate-gateway-api/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/gateway/api/controller/AuthorizationController.java` * `affiliate-gateway/affiliate-gateway-api/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/gateway/api/controller/MoaSampleController.java` * `affiliate-gateway/affiliate-gateway-api/src/main/resources/application.yaml` ```I have generated the technical wiki page for "Affiliate Gateway API" in Markdown format, incorporating the gathered information, Korean explanations, English technical terms and headers, and a Mermaid diagram, all while citing the source files.

affiliateLogBatch.title: Affiliate Log Batch
affiliateLogBatch.content:
No tool calls made. Waiting for the search command to complete. # Affiliate Log Batch ## Overview `Affiliate Log Batch`는 Gmarket의 제휴(Affiliate) 시스템에서 발생하는 Spring Batch 메타데이터 로그를 정기적으로 정리하고 관리하는 관리형 배치 애플리케이션입니다. 배치 실행 과정에서 축적되는 Spring Batch 프레임워크의 대용량 실행 이력 데이터(`BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION`, `BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE` 등)를 정기적으로 삭제하여 시스템 성능 저하를 방지하고 데이터베이스 공간을 효율적으로 유지하는 것을 목적으로 합니다. 이 애플리케이션은 Spring Boot 3.x 환경에서 Spring Batch 5.x를 사용하여 구현되었으며, 대용량 로그 삭제 작업의 효율성을 위해 **Java Parallel Stream(ForkJoinPool)**을 이용한 병렬 쓰기 아키텍처를 채택하고 있습니다. --- ## Architecture Affiliate Log Batch는 Spring Boot 기반의 단독 배치 애플리케이션 구조를 가집니다. 주요 아키텍처 특징은 다음과 같습니다: 1. **Multi-Tenant & Data Source Management**: InternalFramework 플랫폼의 `@EnableSaturnDataSource`를 통해 주 데이터 소스(`affiliateDataSource`)를 주입받아 사용하며, 멀티테넌트 환경(Gmarket, Auction)을 지원합니다. 2. **MoA & Feign Client Integration**: Gmarket의 MSA 오케스트레이션 엔진인 MoA 및 Feign Client를 활성화하여 배치 모니터링 이벤트를 외부 서비스에 전송합니다. 3. **Custom Table Prefix & Schema**: Spring Batch의 메타데이터 테이블은 기본 스키마가 아닌 `O_GAFFILIATE` 스키마 하위의 커스텀 접두사(`O_GAFFILIATE.BATCH_`)를 사용하도록 매핑되어 있습니다. 4. **Parallelism via Custom ForkJoinPool**: 데이터 삭제 시 메인 트랜잭션 스레드 부하를 줄이고 처리 성능을 극대화하기 위해 설정값에 지정된 병렬 스레드(기본값: 4)를 생성하여 병렬 Deletion을 수행합니다. ### Source Files Reference * **Main Entry Point**: * [AffiliateLogBatchApplication.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-log-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/AffiliateLogBatchApplication.java) * **Job Configuration**: * [AffiliateLogRetentionAggregateJobConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-log-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/job/AffiliateLogRetentionAggregateJobConfig.java) * **Step Configuration**: * [BatchJobExecutionStepConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-log-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/step/BatchJobExecutionStepConfig.java) * [BatchJobInstanceStepConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-log-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/step/BatchJobInstanceStepConfig.java) * **Reader & Writer**: * [BatchJobExecutionReader.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-log-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/reader/BatchJobExecutionReader.java) * [BatchJobExecutionWriter.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-log-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/writer/BatchJobExecutionWriter.java) * [BatchJobInstanceReader.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-log-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/reader/BatchJobInstanceReader.java) * [BatchJobInstanceWriter.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-log-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/writer/BatchJobInstanceWriter.java) * **Core Service & Repositories**: * [AffiliateBatchLogRetentionService.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/lib-core/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/service/affiliate/AffiliateBatchLogRetentionService.java) * [BatchJobExecutionJpaRepository.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/lib-core/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/repository/jpa/affiliate/BatchJobExecutionJpaRepository.java) * **Listeners**: * [AffiliateLogRetentionJobListener.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-log-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/listener/AffiliateLogRetentionJobListener.java) * [AffiliateLogRetentionStepListener.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-log-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/listener/AffiliateLogRetentionStepListener.java) * **Configuration Properties**: * [application-gmarket.yaml](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-log-batch/src/main/resources/application-gmarket.yaml) --- ## Technical Components ### 1. AffiliateLogBatchApplication 애플리케이션의 메인 클래스로서 의존성 및 부트스트랩 핵심 설정을 주입합니다. * `@EnableBatchProcessing`: Spring Batch 인프라 구성을 활성화합니다. * `@EnableSaturnDataSource`: InternalFramework 플랫폼 환경에서 `"affiliateDataSource"`를 Primary Bean으로 생성하고, 리포지토리 패키지 경로(`com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.repository.jpa`)를 탐색합니다. * `@EnableMoA`: MoA 통신 인터셉터 및 필터를 활성화합니다. * `@EnableFeignClients` & `@EnableCaching`: 타 서비스 연동을 위한 Feign Client 구성 및 캐싱 성능 최적화를 제공합니다. * `CommandLineRunner`: 애플리케이션 최초 구동 시 테넌트 환경 검증을 위해 `domain`과 `tenantId` 환경 변수 값을 로그로 출력합니다. ### 2. AffiliateLogRetentionAggregateJobConfig 스케줄러 설정 및 배치 Job의 전체 오케스트레이션을 담당하는 설정 클래스입니다. * **스케줄 트리거**: `@Scheduled(cron = "${com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.data.affiliateLogData.schedule}")` 어노테이션을 사용하여 매일 오전 10시에 자동으로 실행됩니다. * **고유 파라미터 구성**: `affiliateLogRetentionAggregate()` 실행 시, `System.currentTimeMillis()`를 `JOB_NAME` 파라미터 값으로 넘겨 동일한 일자에도 새로운 인스턴스로 인식되도록 설계되었습니다. ### 3. Step Configurations #### BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION_1 Step (BatchJobExecutionStepConfig) * **역할**: 설정된 날짜 범위 내의 `BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION` 테이블 데이터 및 관련 자식 테이블 행 데이터를 청크 단위로 조회해 일괄 삭제합니다. * **구조**: `Reader -> Writer` 구조를 취하고 있으며 별도의 `Processor`는 거치지 않습니다. * **청크 튜닝**: `AffiliateBatchDataProperties`에서 지정한 `chunk` 설정(기본값: 1,000) 크기만큼 트랜잭션 단위를 묶어 처리합니다. * **트랜잭션**: `affiliateJpaTransactionManager` 및 `defaultStepTransactionAttribute`를 이용합니다. #### BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE_2 Step (BatchJobInstanceStepConfig) * **역할**: 연결된 `BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION` 레코드가 존재하지 않는 고립된(Orphaned) `BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE` 데이터를 조회해 정리합니다. * **구조**: `Reader -> Writer` (Processor 없음). * **청크**: 1,000건 단위 청크 처리. ### 4. Readers #### BatchJobExecutionReader * `JdbcCursorItemReader<BatchJobExecutionIdDto>`를 확장하여 구현되었습니다. * **조회 쿼리**: ```sql /*AppId:affiliate-log-batch, Inspect:com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.reader.BatchJobExecutionReader */ SELECT JOB_EXECUTION_ID FROM ${schema}.BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION WHERE START_TIME >= TO_DATE(:startDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND START_TIME < TO_DATE(:endDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ``` * **파라미터 바인딩**: `startDate` 및 `endDate` 파라미터가 비어 있는 채로 트리거되는 경우 기본적으로 **어제(Yesterday) ~ 오늘(Today)** 날짜가 바인딩됩니다. * **동적 튜닝**: `fetchSize` (기본 1,000), `queryTimeout` (기본 100초), `connectionAutoCommit` (false) 옵션이 설정되어 대용량 조회 시 메모리 과부하를 예방합니다. #### BatchJobInstanceReader * `JdbcCursorItemReader<BatchJobInstanceIdDto>`를 확장하여 구현되었습니다. * **조회 쿼리**: ```sql /*AppId:affiliate-log-batch, Inspect:com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.reader.BatchJobInstanceReader */ SELECT A.JOB_INSTANCE_ID FROM ${schema}.BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE A LEFT JOIN ${schema}.BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION B ON A.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = B.JOB_INSTANCE_ID WHERE B.JOB_INSTANCE_ID IS NULL ``` * 실행 이력이 모두 삭제되어 참조 대상이 없어진 Job Instance 리스트를 탐색합니다. ### 5. Writers #### BatchJobExecutionWriter & BatchJobInstanceWriter * `ItemWriter` 인터페이스를 구현하며, 병렬 처리 유틸리티 클래스인 `ParallelStreamSupport`를 통해 청크에 들어온 아이템 리스트를 다중 스레드로 처리합니다. * `ParallelStreamSupport` 내부적으로 `ForkJoinPool(parallelSize)` (기본 크기: 4) 스레드 풀을 생성하여, 청크 내 개별 삭제를 수행합니다. ### 6. Deletion Service & Cascading Constraint * `AffiliateBatchLogRetentionService` 내부에서 데이터베이스의 외래 키(Foreign Key) 제약조건에 맞춰 다음 순서대로 데이터를 하향식으로 삭제합니다. ```mermaid graph TD subgraph DeletionOrder ["데이터 삭제 처리 순서 (Cascading Delete Order)"] D1["1. BATCH_STEP_EXECUTION_CONTEXT
(Step 실행 컨텍스트 삭제)"] D2["2. BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION_CONTEXT
(Job 실행 컨텍스트 삭제)"] D3["3. BATCH_STEP_EXECUTION
(Step 실행 이력 삭제)"] D4["4. BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION_PARAMS
(Job 파라미터 삭제)"] D5["5. BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION
(Job 실행 이력 본체 삭제)"] D6["6. BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE
(Step 2에서 최종 인스턴스 정보 삭제)"] D1 --> D2 D2 --> D3 D3 --> D4 D4 --> D5 D5 --> D6 end ``` > [!NOTE] > 코드 내 설계상 `BatchJobExecutionJpaRepository` 인터페이스에는 `removeBatchStepExecutionAllByJobExecutionId`라는 명칭의 메서드가 있으나, 실제 동작 쿼리는 `@Query("delete from BatchJobExecutionJpaEntity a where a.jobExecutionId = :jobExecutionId")` 매핑을 통해 본체 테이블 `BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION`에서 레코드를 삭제하도록 지정되어 있습니다. (이름에 주의해야 합니다) --- ## System Flow & Execution Sequence ### Flow Diagram: Job Architecture ```mermaid graph TD subgraph AppMain ["Main Application"] A["AffiliateLogBatchApplication
(Spring Boot Entry Point)"] end subgraph ConfigSch ["Job Configuration & Scheduling"] B["AffiliateLogRetentionAggregateJobConfig"] C["Scheduled Trigger
(Cron: 0 0 10 * * *)"] C -->|"Triggers"| B end subgraph Execution ["Job Execution"] B -->|"Launches"| D["affiliateLogRetentionAggregate()"] D -->|"Executes"| E["JobLauncher.run()"] E -->|"Runs Job"| F["affiliateBatchLogRetentionAggregateJob"] end subgraph Steps ["Job Steps & Components"] F -->|"Step 1"| G["batchJobExecutionStep
(STEP: BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION_1)"] G -->|"Step 2"| H["batchJobInstanceStep
(STEP: BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE_2)"] G -->|"Reads"| R1["BatchJobExecutionReader
(JdbcCursorItemReader)"] G -->|"Writes (Parallel)"| W1["BatchJobExecutionWriter
(ItemWriter)"] H -->|"Reads"| R2["BatchJobInstanceReader
(JdbcCursorItemReader)"] H -->|"Writes (Parallel)"| W2["BatchJobInstanceWriter
(ItemWriter)"] end subgraph Service ["Service & DB Layer"] W1 -->|"Calls"| S1["AffiliateBatchLogRetentionService"] W2 -->|"Calls"| S1 S1 -->|"Removes executions & instances"| DB["Database
(affiliateDataSource / InternalFramework)"] end subgraph CrossCutting ["Cross-Cutting Concerns"] L1["AffiliateLogRetentionJobListener"] L2["AffiliateLogRetentionStepListener"] F -->|"Monitored by"| L1 G -->|"Monitored by"| L2 H -->|"Monitored by"| L2 end ``` ### Sequence Diagram: Job Execution Flow 아래 시퀀스 다이어그램은 스케줄 트리거 시점부터 청크 조회, 스레드 풀 병렬 처리 및 커밋 단계까지의 생명주기를 나타냅니다. ```mermaid sequenceDiagram autonumber actor Trigger as Scheduler / Trigger participant Launcher as JobLauncher participant Step as Step (BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION_1) participant Reader as BatchJobExecutionReader participant Writer as BatchJobExecutionWriter participant Service as AffiliateBatchLogRetentionService participant DB as Database (affiliateDataSource) Trigger->>Launcher: run(job, param) Launcher->>Step: execute(StepExecution) Note over Step, DB: Chunk Loop (Chunk Size = 1000) loop Until Reader returns null Step->>Step: Start Main Tx (Main Thread) loop 1 to 1000 Step->>Reader: read() Reader->>DB: Fetch JOB_EXECUTION_ID DB-->>Reader: ID DTO Reader-->>Step: item end Step->>Writer: write(Chunk) Note over Writer, DB: Parallel Processing (ForkJoinPool - Threads 1..4) loop Parallel Stream (forEach) Writer->>Service: removeAllBatchJobExecution(item) Service->>Service: Start Tx (Worker Thread) Service->>DB: Execute Delete Queries DB-->>Service: success Service->>Service: Commit Tx (Worker Thread) end Writer-->>Step: return Step->>Step: Commit Main Tx (Main Thread) end Step-->>Launcher: Step complete ``` --- ## Job Schedule & Tuning Configuration | Job Name | Cron or Trigger | Chunk Size | Idempotency | Retry & Skip Policy | | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | | `affiliateBatchLogRetentionAggregateJob` | `0 0 10 * * *`
(Daily 10:00 AM)
`${com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.data.affiliateLogData.schedule}` | 1,000 건
(via `chunk` config) | **Idempotent**
- 트리거 시 `System.currentTimeMillis()`로 고유 파라미터를 넘겨 중복 차단 방지.
- ID 기반 `delete` 쿼리이므로 중복 실행 시 영향 없음. | **None**
- 별도의 skip, retry 정책이 설정되어 있지 않음.
- DB 데드락 등 실패 예외 발생 시 배치 즉시 종료. | | `affiliateBatchJobInstanceRetentionJob` | 수동 / Ad-hoc 트리거 | 1,000 건
(via `chunk` config) | **Idempotent**
- 연결 레코드가 유실된 고립 인스턴스만 삭제하므로 안전하게 다회 수행 가능. | **None**
- 실패 복구 시점 정책 미지정. | --- ## Failure & Re-run Behavior 배치 구동 중 DB 커넥션 타임아웃, 교착 상태(Deadlock) 또는 제약 조건 오류로 인해 예외가 발생할 경우 배치 작업은 즉시 실패(`FAILED`) 상태가 됩니다. 단계 리스너인 `AffiliateLogRetentionStepListener`가 `afterStep()` 메서드에서 예외 목록을 감지하고, 오류 스택트레이스를 로깅한 후 `SendMessageSupportService`를 통해 슬랙(Slack) 혹은 MS 팀즈(Teams) 등의 모니터링 채널로 즉시 실패 경보 알림을 전송합니다. > [!WARNING] > **트랜잭션 전파 및 롤백 한계 주의**: > Spring Batch는 메인 스레드 상에서 `StepBuilder`에 지정된 트랜잭션 매니저를 통해 청크 레벨 트랜잭션을 시작합니다. > 하지만 본 배치 애플리케이션의 `BatchJobExecutionWriter` 및 `BatchJobInstanceWriter`는 성능 확보를 위해 Java `parallelStream`을 호출하여 커스텀 `ForkJoinPool` 내부 스레드들로 처리를 분산시킵니다. > Spring 프레임워크의 `@Transactional` 어노테이션은 기본적으로 **스레드 로컬(Thread-bound)** 방식으로 동작하므로, 메인 트레드 스레드에서 생성된 트랜잭션 컨텍스트는 `ForkJoinPool`의 워커 스레드로 전파되지 않습니다. > 이에 따라 워커 스레드 상에서 구동되는 `removeAllBatchJobExecution()` 및 `removeBatchJobInstance()` 호출은 각각 개별 트랜잭션을 새로 기동하여 완료 즉시 DB에 커밋합니다. > 결과적으로 청크 수행 도중 특정 아이템 삭제 실패로 예외가 발생해도, **이전까지 다른 개별 워커 스레드를 통해 삭제 커밋이 완료된 레코드들은 전체 롤백되지 않고 물리적으로 삭제 상태가 유지됩니다.** **재실행(Re-run) 방법**: 실패 이력이 발견되면 시스템 운영자는 원인(예: DB 락 경합 등)을 조치한 뒤 배치를 수동 재실행할 수 있습니다. 구동할 때 고유성 보장을 위해 매번 스케줄 파라미터로 고유한 타임스탬프(`System.currentTimeMillis()`) 값이 바인딩되므로, 이전 실행에 상관없이 독립적인 Job Instance로 동작하게 됩니다. 삭제 쿼리는 이미 해당 ID가 테이블에 없으면 무시되는 구조(Idempotent)이므로 안전하게 재시도할 수 있습니다.

affiliateOrderBatch.title: Affiliate Order Batch
affiliateOrderBatch.content:
I will wait for the search to complete to find the location of the source files. I will wait for the search to complete. # Affiliate Order Batch ## Overview `Affiliate Order Batch`는 제휴사(Affiliate) 주문 유입 및 처리 과정에서 발생한 실패 주문 데이터를 재처리하는 배치 작업을 관리하는 Spring Boot 기반의 애플리케이션입니다. 이 문서는 다음 소스 코드를 기반으로 작성되었습니다: - [AffiliateOrderBatchApplication.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-order-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/AffiliateOrderBatchApplication.java) - [AffiliateOrderRetryJobConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-order-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/job/AffiliateOrderRetryJobConfig.java) - [AffiliateOrderRetryStepConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-order-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/step/AffiliateOrderRetryStepConfig.java) - [AffiliateOrderRetryItemReader.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-order-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/reader/AffiliateOrderRetryItemReader.java) - [AffiliateOrderRetryItemWriter.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-order-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/writer/AffiliateOrderRetryItemWriter.java) - [OrderService.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/lib-core/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/service/OrderService.java) - [AffiliateOrderTokenRepository.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/lib-core/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/repository/AffiliateOrderTokenRepository.java) - [AffiliateBatchDataProperties.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/lib-core/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/data/properties/AffiliateBatchDataProperties.java) ## Architecture `Affiliate Order Batch` 애플리케이션은 Spring Batch 프레임워크를 기반으로 구축되었으며, InternalFramework DataSource를 활용하여 데이터베이스 환경을 구성합니다. 시스템 간 원활한 연동을 위해 MoA 모듈 및 Feign Client가 활성화되어 있습니다. ### Component Diagram ```mermaid graph TD subgraph AppInit ["Application Initialization"] A["AffiliateOrderBatchApplication"] --> B["Spring Boot Core"] B --> C["InternalFramework DataSource Config"] B --> D["MoA & Feign Clients"] end subgraph JobConfig ["Scheduled Job Configuration"] E["@Scheduled Scheduler"] -- "cron: com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.data.affiliateOrderRetryData.schedule" --> F["JobLauncher"] F -- "run with current timestamp param" --> G["affiliateOrderRetryJob"] end subgraph StepExecution ["Step & Chunk Processing"] G --> H["affiliateOrderRetryStep"] H -- "1. Read (JdbcCursorItemReader)" --> I["AffiliateOrderRetryItemReader"] H -- "2. Write (Parallel Stream)" --> J["AffiliateOrderRetryItemWriter"] J -- "Parallel API Call" --> K["AffiliateAggregatorApiClient (Feign)"] J -- "If ORDER_KEY_SEARCH" --> L["AffiliateOrderTokenRepository (complete)"] end I -->|Query| M[("Database (AFFILIATE_ORDER_TOKEN)")] L -- "Update EXECUTION_YN = 'Y'" --> M ``` ### Job Execution Sequence Diagram 아래 시퀀스 다이어그램은 `affiliateOrderRetryJob`이 스케줄러에 의해 주기적으로 트리거되고, Chunk 단위 트랜잭션 범위 내에서 데이터를 읽고 쓰는 실행 순서와 트랜잭션 커밋 시점을 보여줍니다. ```mermaid sequenceDiagram autonumber participant Scheduler as "Scheduler / Trigger
(@Scheduled)" participant Launcher as "JobLauncher" participant Step as "Step
(affiliateOrderRetryStep)" participant Reader as "ItemReader
(AffiliateOrderRetryItemReader)" participant Writer as "ItemWriter
(AffiliateOrderRetryItemWriter)" participant DB as "Database / External API" Scheduler->>Launcher: run(affiliateOrderRetryJob, param) activate Launcher Launcher->>Step: execute(StepExecution) activate Step Note over Step, DB: Transaction Start (PlatformTransactionManager) loop Chunk Loop (until chunk-size or EOF) Step->>Reader: read() activate Reader Reader->>DB: Fetch AFFILIATE_ORDER_TOKEN (EXECUTION_YN = 'N') DB-->>Reader: AffiliateOrderTokenJpaEntity Reader-->>Step: Entity deactivate Reader end Note over Step, DB: Chunk Boundary Reached (items count = chunk-size) Step->>Writer: write(Chunk) activate Writer Writer->>DB: inflowOrder(items) (Parallel API Call via Feign) DB-->>Writer: Success / failure (e.g., ORDER_KEY_SEARCH) opt ORDER_KEY_SEARCH Failure Writer->>DB: complete(item, 'Y') (Local DB update) end Writer-->>Step: Done deactivate Writer Note over Step, DB: Transaction Commit (Commit point) Step-->>Launcher: StepExecution Status deactivate Step Launcher-->>Scheduler: JobExecution Status deactivate Launcher ``` ## Core Functionality ### 1. Scheduler Trigger & Job Launching `AffiliateOrderRetryJobConfig` 클래스는 `@EnableScheduling` 및 `@Scheduled` 애노테이션을 통해 주기적으로 `affiliateOrderRetry` 메서드를 호출합니다. - **JobParameter 동적 생성**: 실행 시점에 `System.currentTimeMillis()` 값을 매개변수로 추가하여, 매번 독립적인 `JobInstance`가 생성될 수 있도록 보장합니다. 이는 Spring Batch에서 동일한 파라미터로 실행에 실패한 동일 Job이 중복 실행이 제한되는 현상을 방지합니다. ### 2. Item Reading `AffiliateOrderRetryItemReader`는 `JdbcCursorItemReader`를 상속받아 구현되었습니다. - **SQL Query**: ```sql SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM AFFILIATE_ORDER_TOKEN T WHERE T.INS_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(:startDate, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(:endDate, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND T.EXECUTION_YN = 'N' ORDER BY T.INS_DATE ) A WHERE ROWNUM < :rownum ``` - **조회 대상 추출 로직**: `JobParameters` 또는 설정파일로부터 주입받은 `timeUnit`, `intervals`, `duration` 값을 바탕으로, 현재 시간 대비 유입 시점을 역산하여 `startDate`와 `endDate` 구간 내에서 성공 처리가 완료되지 않은(`EXECUTION_YN = 'N'`) 데이터를 가져옵니다. ### 3. Item Writing & External API Integration `AffiliateOrderRetryItemWriter`는 `ItemWriter` 인터페이스를 구현하며, Spring Batch에서 읽어온 `AffiliateOrderTokenJpaEntity` 청크 데이터를 받아 `OrderService`로 전달합니다. - **Parallel Stream Processing**: `ParallelStreamSupport`를 통해 배치에서 읽어 들인 청크 데이터를 병렬 프로세스로 처리합니다. 구성된 `parallelSize`에 해당하는 스레드 풀(`ForkJoinPool`)을 가동하여 멀티스레드로 외부 API를 호출함으로써 대량의 재시도 건을 신속하게 처리할 수 있습니다. - **External Integration (Feign Client)**: `AffiliateAggregatorApiClient`를 호출하여 제휴사 주문 유입(`inflowOrder`)을 재수행합니다. - **ORDER_KEY_SEARCH 예외 케이스 처리**: 제휴사 주문 정보 조회가 원천적으로 불가능한 경우 외부 API는 `ORDER_KEY_SEARCH` 에러 코드를 응답합니다. 이러한 데이터는 지속적인 재시도가 무의미하므로, 배치 자체에서 `AffiliateOrderTokenRepository.complete()`를 호출해 해당 토큰의 `EXECUTION_YN` 값을 `'Y'`로 강제 갱신하여 처리 완료 대상자로 제외시킵니다. ## Job Schedule and Tuning | Job Name | Cron / Trigger | Chunk Size | Idempotency | Retry & Skip Policy | | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | | `affiliateOrderRetryJob` | `${com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.data.affiliateOrderRetryData.schedule}` | `${com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.data.affiliateOrderRetryData.chunk}` | `Yes`
- Job Parameter에 타임스탬프 값을 매번 부여해 독립 실행 보장
- 대상 데이터를 `EXECUTION_YN = 'N'` 상태 값만 필터링하여 조회하므로 중복 처리 차단 | `No Explicit Retry/Skip Policy`
- Spring Batch 프레임워크 자체의 재시도(Retry)/건너뛰기(Skip) 설정 대신, 에러가 발생한 건에 대해서는 상태값을 `'N'`으로 유지하여 다음 스케줄러 실행 시 다시 읽혀 재시도되도록 설계됨 | ## Failure & Re-run Behavior 배치 수행 중 외부 연동 API 서버 지연이나 DB 일시 장애 등 일시적인(Transient) 장애 상황이 발생하여 예외가 던져지면, Spring Batch는 해당 청크 트랜잭션을 롤백하고 전체 배치는 실패(`FAILED`) 상태로 종료됩니다. 하지만 본 배치는 별도의 수동 재수행 과정 없이도 자가 복구가 가능하도록 설계되어 있습니다. 처리 실패한 데이터는 데이터베이스 내 `EXECUTION_YN` 값이 `'N'` 상태 그대로 남아있기 때문에, 다음 Scheduled 주기(Cron 주기)가 도래하면 `ItemReader`에 의해 자동으로 대상 데이터로 다시 읽혀져 API 호출 재시도가 진행됩니다. 영구 실패 원인(예: 조회할 수 없는 유효하지 않은 토큰 정보)인 경우에는 연동 서버로부터 `ORDER_KEY_SEARCH` 오류 응답을 수신하게 되며, 이 경우 배치는 데이터베이스 내 `EXECUTION_YN` 상태를 `'Y'`로 업데이트하여 다음 실행 주기부터 조회 대상에서 제외되도록 명시적 예외 처리가 가동됩니다.

affiliateRetentionBatch.title: Affiliate Retention Batch
affiliateRetentionBatch.content:
# Affiliate Retention Batch ## Overview (개요) `Affiliate Retention Batch`는 Gmarket Affiliate 시스템에서 리텐션 데이터를 처리하고 보존 기간이 지난 비즈니스 로그 데이터를 데이터베이스에서 정리(Clean-up)하기 위해 개발된 Spring Batch 애플리케이션입니다. 초기에는 서비스 유입(Inflow) 정보와 관련된 대용량 로그 데이터를 일정 기간(기본 1개월) 보존 후 주기적으로 삭제하는 스케줄 작업을 수행했습니다. 하지만 인플로우 로그 테이블이 MongoDB로 마이그레이션되고, 리텐션 로직 자체가 데이터베이스 내부 프로세스로 처리되도록 변경됨에 따라, 현재 본 배치 애플리케이션의 자동 스케줄링 실행(`@Scheduled`)은 주석 처리되어 비활성화되어 있으며 필요에 따라 수동으로만 실행 가능한 상태입니다. --- ## System Architecture (시스템 아키텍처) 이 애플리케이션은 Spring Boot와 Spring Batch 5 프레임워크를 기반으로 구축되었습니다. ### Application Configuration (애플리케이션 설정) * **`@SpringBootApplication`**: 표준 Spring Boot 애플리케이션의 설정과 빈 자동 등록을 담당합니다. * **`@EnableScheduling`**: 스케줄링된 배치 작업을 실행할 수 있도록 활성화합니다 (현재는 설정 코드 수준에서 스케줄 메서드가 주석 처리되어 작동하지 않음). * **`@EnableCaching`**: 배치 실행 중 활용될 캐시 서비스를 활성화합니다. * **`@EnableFeignClients`**: 마이크로서비스 간 통신을 위해 Feign 클라이언트를 활성화합니다. * **`@EnableSaturnDataSource`**: `affiliateDataSource`를 주 데이터 소스로 지정하며, JPA 리포지토리가 참조할 엔티티 패키지(`com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.repository.jpa`)를 스캔합니다. * **타임존 설정**: `@PostConstruct` 블록을 통해 JVM의 기본 타임존을 서울 시간("Asia/Seoul")으로 강제 지정하여 데이터 시간 조회 불일치 문제를 차단합니다. * **Spring Batch 5 경고 우회**: `jobRegistryBeanPostProcessorRemover`를 통해 Spring Batch 5 환경에서 불필요한 빈 등록 경고를 동적으로 제거하는 PostProcessor를 등록해 둡니다. --- ## Batch Job Flow (배치 작업 흐름) `AffiliateRetentionJobConfig`에서 정의한 `affiliateRetentionDataJob`은 총 3개의 순차적인 `Step`으로 이루어져 있으며, 각 단계별로 별도의 인플로우 로그 테이블을 대상으로 삭제 처리를 수행합니다. ```mermaid graph TD subgraph JOB ["Job: affiliateRetentionDataJob"] start_node["Job Start"] --> step1["affiliateRetentionInflowLogDataStep
(Inflow Log 삭제)"] step1 --> step2["affiliateRetentionPCSInflowAllStep
(PCS Inflow Log 삭제)"] step2 --> step3["affiliateRetentionChannelInflowAllStep
(Channel Inflow Log 삭제)"] step3 --> end_node["Job End"] end ``` 1. **`affiliateRetentionInflowLogDataStep`** * **역할**: 일반 서비스 유입 로그(`AFFILIATE_INFLOW_LOG`) 테이블에서 기준 보존 기간이 지난 데이터를 삭제합니다. 2. **`affiliateRetentionPCSInflowAllStep`** * **역할**: PCS(Short URL 형식)를 통한 유입 로그(`PCS_INFLOW_LOG`) 테이블에서 기준 보존 기간이 지난 데이터를 삭제합니다. 3. **`affiliateRetentionChannelInflowAllStep`** * **역할**: 마케팅 채널 유입 로그(`CHANNEL_INFLOW_LOG`) 테이블에서 기준 보존 기간이 지난 데이터를 삭제합니다. --- ## Step Execution Sequence (단계 실행 시퀀스) Spring Batch의 Chunk 지향 아키텍처에 기반한 단일 Step 실행 흐름은 다음과 같습니다. 데이터의 조회(Read)와 삭제(Write)가 트랜잭션 경계 안에서 청크 단위(기본 1000개)로 처리됩니다. 본 작업은 영구 삭제 프로세스이므로 중간 가공 단계인 `ItemProcessor`는 생략되어 있습니다 (Pass-through). ```mermaid sequenceDiagram autonumber participant Scheduler as Scheduler / Trigger participant Launcher as JobLauncher participant Job as Job (affiliateRetentionDataJob) participant Step as Step (affiliateRetentionInflowLogDataStep) participant Reader as ItemReader (JdbcPagingItemReader) participant Writer as ItemWriter (JdbcBatchItemWriter) participant Tx as PlatformTransactionManager (affiliateTransactionManager) Scheduler->>Launcher: run(Job, JobParameters) Launcher->>Job: execute() Job->>Step: execute(StepExecution) loop Chunk Boundary (EOF 도달 시까지 반복) Step->>Tx: getTransaction(TransactionDefinition) Note over Step, Tx: 트랜잭션 경계 시작 (Transaction Start) loop Chunk Size 만큼 반복 (e.g., chunk=1000) Step->>Reader: read() Reader-->>Step: Item (JpaEntity / Dto) end Note over Step: No ItemProcessor (Pass-through) Step->>Writer: write(Chunk) Note over Writer: DELETE 쿼리 실행 (Sequence ID 기준) Writer-->>Step: success Step->>Tx: commit(status) Note over Step, Tx: 트랜잭션 커밋 완료 (Transaction Commit Point) end Step-->>Job: StepExecution completed Job-->>Launcher: JobExecution completed Launcher-->>Scheduler: Return JobExecution ``` --- ## Job Schedule & Tuning (작업 스케줄 및 튜닝) | 항목 | 상세 정보 (Tuning Details) | |---|---| | **Job Name** | `affiliateRetentionDataJob` (Defined in [AffiliateRetentionJobConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-retention-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/job/AffiliateRetentionJobConfig.java)) | | **Cron / Trigger** | `0 0 6 * * *` (Daily 06:00 KST)
*※ 현재는 소스상 `@Scheduled` 주석 처리되어 스케줄러를 통한 자동 실행은 발생하지 않음.* | | **Chunk Size** | `1000` (Defined in application properties under `chunk` configuration) | | **Fetch Size** | `1000` (Defined in application properties under `fetchSize` configuration) | | **Idempotency (멱등성)** | **보장됨 (Idempotent)**
기준 과거 일자(기본 1달 전)를 계산하여 조회된 Sequence ID를 기준으로 데이터의 `DELETE` 쿼리를 일괄적으로 처리하므로, 동일한 파라미터로 여러 번 재실행하여도 중복 가공이나 예외 발생의 우려가 없으며 최종 데이터 상태가 안전하게 보장됩니다. | | **Retry & Skip Policy** | **설정 없음 (None)**
예외 발생 시 Step은 실패 처리(Failed)되며 해당 Chunk 범위는 롤백 처리됩니다. | --- ## Failure & Re-run Behavior (장애 대응 및 재실행 동작) ### Failure Behavior (실패 시 동작) 배치 작업 도중 데이터베이스 커넥션 타임아웃, 트랜잭션 타임아웃(기본 설정: 3초), 혹은 SQL 오류 등의 예외가 발생하면 해당 Step은 즉시 실패(`FAILED`) 상태가 되며 현재 가공 중이던 Chunk 영역 내의 트랜잭션이 롤백됩니다. 다만, 이전에 성공적으로 처리가 끝난 Chunk들은 데이터베이스 수준에서 이미 커밋(`COMMIT`)이 완료된 상태이므로 복구 작업 시 이전 삭제 완료 데이터가 다시 살아나지 않습니다. ### Re-run Behavior (재실행 방식) Spring Batch는 기본적으로 동일한 Job Parameters를 사용하는 기존 배치 인스턴스가 정상 수료되었을 경우 동일 인스턴스의 재실행을 차단합니다. `Affiliate Retention Batch`는 이를 극복하기 위해 `AffiliateRetentionJobConfig.java` 내에서 Job Parameters 생성 시 `affiliateRetentionDataJob` 키에 항상 밀리초 단위의 타임스탬프(`System.currentTimeMillis()`) 값을 파라미터로 매핑합니다. 이를 통해 Spring Batch가 매번 고유한 Job Instance로 인식하여, 장애 발생 후 별도의 데이터 보정 작업 없이 수동 트리거나 REST API 요청을 통해 언제든지 손쉽게 처음부터 재실행(Re-run)할 수 있도록 구현되어 있습니다. --- ## Source Files (소스 파일 및 컴포넌트 정보) 이 기술 문서는 다음 주요 소스 파일들의 구현 세부사항을 바탕으로 작성되었습니다. * **Application Bootstrapper** * [AffiliateRetentionBatchApplication.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-retention-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/AffiliateRetentionBatchApplication.java): Spring Boot 진입점 설정 및 타임존 초기화, Batch 5 경고 빈 해제 처리 * **Job & Step Configuration** * [AffiliateRetentionJobConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-retention-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/job/AffiliateRetentionJobConfig.java): Job 플로우 정의 및 수동 호출 컨트롤을 위한 파라미터 맵핑 * [AffiliateRetentionInflowLogStepConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-retention-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/step/AffiliateRetentionInflowLogStepConfig.java): Inflow Log 삭제 단계 상세 설정 (Chunk, TransactionManager 지정) * [AffiliateRetentionPCSInflowAllStepConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-retention-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/step/AffiliateRetentionPCSInflowAllStepConfig.java): PCS Inflow Log 단계 상세 설정 * [AffiliateRetentionChannelInflowAllStepConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-retention-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/step/AffiliateRetentionChannelInflowAllStepConfig.java): Channel Inflow Log 단계 상세 설정 * **Readers & Writers (Item Components)** * [AffiliateRetentionInflowLogDataItemReader.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-retention-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/reader/AffiliateRetentionInflowLogDataItemReader.java): `AFFILIATE_INFLOW_LOG` 테이블에서 보존 기간이 초과한 대상 데이터를 페이징 조회하는 Reader * [AffiliateRetentionInflowLogDataItemWriter.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-retention-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/writer/AffiliateRetentionInflowLogDataItemWriter.java): 조회된 Sequence ID를 넘겨받아 해당 로그를 물리적으로 `DELETE`하는 Writer * [AffiliateRetentionPCSInflowAllItemReader.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-retention-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/reader/AffiliateRetentionPCSInflowAllItemReader.java): `PCS_INFLOW_LOG` 테이블용 대상 데이터 조회 Reader * [AffiliateRetentionPcsInflowLogItemWriter.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-retention-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/writer/AffiliateRetentionPcsInflowLogItemWriter.java): `PCS_INFLOW_LOG` 테이블용 대상 데이터 삭제 Writer * [AffiliateRetentionChannelInflowAllItemReaderConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-retention-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/reader/AffiliateRetentionChannelInflowAllItemReaderConfig.java): `CHANNEL_INFLOW_LOG` 테이블용 대상 데이터 조회 Reader (Java Config 기반) * [AffiliateRetentionChannelInflowLogItemWriterConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-retention-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/writer/AffiliateRetentionChannelInflowLogItemWriterConfig.java): `CHANNEL_INFLOW_LOG` 테이블용 대상 데이터 삭제 Writer (Java Config 기반) * **Properties & Core Library References** * [AffiliateBatchDataProperties.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/lib-core/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/data/properties/AffiliateBatchDataProperties.java): 리텐션 주기(기본 1개월), FetchSize, Chunk 크기 설정을 담당하는 프로퍼티 홀더 구조 클래스 * [ObjectSupport.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/lib-core/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/support/ObjectSupport.java): Null 세이프티 처리 및 파라미터 Fallback 기능 제공 유틸리티 클래스

affiliateSettlementBatch.title: Affiliate Settlement Batch
affiliateSettlementBatch.content:
# Affiliate Settlement Batch ## Overview `Affiliate Settlement Batch` is a robust Spring Boot batch application based on the Spring Batch framework, designed to automate and orchestrate Gmarket's partner settlement (Affiliate Settlement) workflows. It manages complex daily and monthly computations, handles transport completion updates, processes refunds, and runs rigorous amount verification algorithms across databases. To support high-throughput processing, caching, Feign clients, and distributed data sources are configured. The primary database infrastructure is managed through Gmarket's custom `@EnableSaturnDataSource` wrapper, which binds the primary database to `affiliateDataSource` and leverages JPA repositories for data persistence. - **Main Entry Point:** [AffiliateSettlementBatchApplication.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-settlement-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/AffiliateSettlementBatchApplication.java) - **Job Definition:** [AffiliateSettlementAggregateJobConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-settlement-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/job/AffiliateSettlementAggregateJobConfig.java) --- ## Architecture & Data Source Flow The application architecture divides processing into chunk-oriented steps executing within transactional bounds. Instead of raw SQL strings, complex DB insertions and updates are modularized using MS-SQL Stored Procedures, invoked through the InternalFramework framework (`@SaturnProcedure`). ### Sequence Diagram: Job Execution Order and Chunk Boundaries The following diagram illustrates the lifecycle of a single job execution, highlighting how chunk boundaries, data reading, processing, writing, and database transaction commits are coordinated: ```mermaid sequenceDiagram autonumber participant Sch as Scheduler / Trigger (@Scheduled) participant JL as JobLauncher participant Step as Step (Chunk-Oriented) participant IR as ItemReader participant IP as ItemProcessor participant IW as ItemWriter participant TX as TransactionManager (JPA_TRANSACTION_MANAGER_AFFILIATE) Sch->>JL: run(Job, JobParameters) JL->>Step: execute(StepExecution) loop For each Chunk (up to chunk-size) Step->>TX: begin(Transaction) Note over Step, TX: Start of Transaction Boundary loop Chunk Iteration (1 to N, where N = 1000 or 100000) Step->>IR: read() IR-->>Step: Item DTO Step->>IP: process(Item DTO) IP-->>Step: Processed DTO end Step->>IW: write(ChunkList) Note over IW: Calls @SaturnProcedure (Stored Procedure) IW-->>Step: success Step->>TX: commit() Note over Step, TX: Commit Point (Transaction Committed to DB) end Step-->>JL: StepExecution (COMPLETED) JL-->>Sch: JobExecution (COMPLETED) ``` --- ## Job Flow Diagram The orchestrator `affiliateSettlementAggregateJob` implements a multi-stage execution flow. It groups related business processes into subgraphs representing Daily Aggregation, Monthly Aggregation & Payment, and Settlement Amount Verification. It also utilizes `JobExecutionDecider` beans to dynamically control retry and refund loops. ```mermaid graph TD subgraph APP ["Application Entry Point"] APP_START["AffiliateSettlementBatchApplication"] --> SCHEDULER["Scheduler (@Scheduled)"] end subgraph JOB_CONFIG ["Job Configuration"] SCHEDULER --> JOB["affiliateSettlementAggregateJob"] end subgraph DAILY_AGG ["Daily Aggregation Steps"] JOB --> DAILY_1["affiliateSettlementDailyStep
(Insert by Order Date)"] DAILY_1 --> DAILY_2["affiliateSettlementDailyRefundStep
(Insert by Refund Date)"] DAILY_2 --> DAILY_3["affiliateSettlementDailyTransportStep
(Update Transport Completed Date)"] DAILY_3 --> DAILY_4["affiliateSettlementDailyTransportRetryStep
(Update Missing Transport Dates)"] DAILY_4 --> DAILY_5["affiliateSettleDetailDailyStep
(Insert AFFILIATE_SETTLE_DETAIL)"] end subgraph MONTHLY_AGG ["Monthly Aggregation & Payment Steps"] DAILY_5 --> MONTHLY_1["affiliateShareInsertSettleMonthlyStep
(Generate Monthly Settle Data)"] MONTHLY_1 --> MONTHLY_2["affiliateShareUpdateSettleSeqMonthlyStep
(Update Daily settle_seq & Status)"] MONTHLY_2 --> MONTHLY_3["affiliateShareUpdateDetailSettleSeqMonthlyStep
(Update Detail settle_seq)"] MONTHLY_3 --> MONTHLY_4["affiliateShareInsertSettleProcMonthlyStep
(Insert Settlement Payment Table)"] MONTHLY_4 --> MONTHLY_5["affiliateShareUpdateSettleDetailMonthlyStep
(Update Detail settle_seq after Proc)"] end subgraph CHECK_STEPS ["Settlement Verification & Adjustment Steps"] MONTHLY_5 --> CHECK_1["affiliateSettleDailyPaymentMinusStep
(Prevent Negative Balance Carryover)"] CHECK_1 --> CHECK_2["affiliateOrderDetailTransportStep
(Compare order detail vs daily settle)"] subgraph DECIDER_TRANS ["Transport Decider Loop"] CHECK_2 --> DTR_DECIDER{"AffiliateOrderDetailTransportDecider"} DTR_DECIDER -- "CONTINUE" --> DTR_ACTION["affiliateSettlementDailyTransportByOrderNoStep
(Process Transport by Order No)"] DTR_ACTION --> DTR_DECIDER DTR_DECIDER -- "COMPLETED" --> CHECK_3["affiliateSettleDailyNDetailCompareStep
(Compare Daily vs Detail Settle Money)"] end CHECK_3 --> CHECK_4["affiliateSettleDailyNDetailCompareByIssueMembStep
(Compare Member-level Totals)"] CHECK_4 --> CHECK_5["affiliateSettleNProcCompareStep
(Compare Settle vs Settle Proc Money)"] CHECK_5 --> CHECK_6["affiliateOrderDetailRefundStep
(Identify Unprocessed Refunds)"] subgraph DECIDER_REFUND ["Refund Decider Loop"] CHECK_6 --> DRF_DECIDER{"AffiliateOrderDetailRefundDecider"} DRF_DECIDER -- "CONTINUE" --> DRF_ACTION["affiliateSettlementDailyRefundByOrderNoStep
(Process Refund by Order No)"] DRF_ACTION --> DRF_DECIDER DRF_DECIDER -- "COMPLETED" --> JOB_END(("Job Completion")) end end ``` --- ## Detailed Step Description ### Daily Aggregation Steps * **affiliateSettlementDailyStep**: Reads newly placed orders and creates raw daily settlement data based on the transaction order dates. * **affiliateSettlementDailyRefundStep**: Reads cancellations and processes refund-based entries to balance settlement figures. * **affiliateSettlementDailyTransportStep**: Syncs transport and delivery systems to update the transport completion status and date on existing records. * **affiliateSettlementDailyTransportRetryStep**: Scans and executes fallback logic for records with missing or failed transport status dates. * **affiliateSettleDetailDailyStep**: Populates the detail table `AFFILIATE_SETTLE_DETAIL` with aggregated daily details, preparing user-facing data (e.g., MyG "expected reward point" view). ### Monthly Aggregation & Payment Steps * **affiliateShareInsertSettleMonthlyStep**: Gathers records scheduled for monthly payout (where the expected date is the current batch day) to formulate the monthly settlement balance. * **affiliateShareUpdateSettleSeqMonthlyStep**: Links daily items to their generated monthly sequence number (`settle_seq`), flags them as finalized (`Y`), and timestamps the completion. * **affiliateShareUpdateDetailSettleSeqMonthlyStep**: Syncs the detail table with the parent monthly sequence key. * **affiliateShareInsertSettleProcMonthlyStep**: Populates the disbursement request table (`AFFILIATE_SETTLE_PROC`) for scheduled payments. * **affiliateShareUpdateSettleDetailMonthlyStep**: Applies final post-disbursement status updates and syncs detail keys. ### Settlement Amount Check Steps (Verification) * **affiliateSettleDailyPaymentMinusStep**: Adjusts cases where orders delivered in prior periods are cancelled post-settlement, capping the debit offset to prevent carrying negative balances forward. * **affiliateOrderDetailTransportStep**: Audit step comparing `AFFILIATE_ORDER_DETAIL` against `AFFILIATE_SETTLE_DAILY` to catch delivery records missing from the settlement tables. * **Loop Processing**: Under the direction of the decider `AffiliateOrderDetailTransportDecider`, it triggers `affiliateSettlementDailyTransportByOrderNoStep` to resolve individual order items sequentially. * **affiliateSettleDailyNDetailCompareStep**: Cross-checks total expected settlement sums between the daily (`Daily`) and detail (`Detail`) tables to guarantee data integrity. * **affiliateSettleDailyNDetailCompareByIssueMembStep**: Pinpoints and logs any inconsistencies in expected sums aggregated on a per-member basis. * **affiliateSettleNProcCompareStep**: Verifies that the aggregate amount in the settlement table matches the total amount written in the payment execution table. * **affiliateOrderDetailRefundStep**: Identifies cases where a return date exists on the order detail but remains unreflected in daily settlement entries. * **Loop Processing**: Guided by `AffiliateOrderDetailRefundDecider`, it invokes `affiliateSettlementDailyRefundByOrderNoStep` for isolated order refund correction. --- ## Scheduling & Tuning Profile The batch system utilizes profile-based configuration files to adjust properties across environments. Below is a comprehensive table detailing the scheduler timings and tuning parameters: | Job Name | Cron / Trigger | Chunk Size | Idempotency Strategy | Retry & Skip Policy | | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **`affiliateSettlementAggregateJob`** | `0 00 7 * * *`
(Daily 07:00 KST) | • **Local/Dev**: 1,000
• **Production**: 100,000 | **Job Instance Level**: Non-idempotent parameters (uses a unique timestamp in `JobParameters` to allow rerun requests).

**Data Level**: Idempotent. Database stored procedures resolve duplicate insertions and perform upserts on primary/unique index violations. | • **Transport & Order-No steps**: Fault-tolerant; retries all `Exception.class` up to 4 times (`retryLimit(4)`).
• **Other steps**: Fail-fast (no retries or skips). | | **`affiliateShareInsertSmileCashEventMonthlyJob`** | `0 00 15 * * *`
(Daily 15:00 KST) | • **Local/Dev**: 1,000
• **Production**: 100,000 | **Job Instance Level**: Non-idempotent parameters (unique timestamp parameter).

**Data Level**: Idempotent via unique database keys. | Fail-fast (no retries or skips configured). | --- ## Failure & Re-run Behavior ### Transaction Boundaries & Rollback Every chunk-oriented step is bound to a Spring transaction managed by `JPA_TRANSACTION_MANAGER_AFFILIATE`. In the event of an unhandled runtime exception (or when the retry limit of 4 is exceeded for retryable transport steps), Spring Batch initiates a transaction rollback. This ensures that the database state returns to the exact condition prior to the current chunk's execution, preventing partial writes and ensuring atomic commit behavior. The job execution metadata is updated to `FAILED` in the metadata tables (prefixed with `BATCH_`). ### Re-run and Recovery Mechanisms Because the scheduler appends a dynamic timestamp parameter (`System.currentTimeMillis()`) to every automated run, the job launcher treats each execution as a new `JobInstance`. This prevents `JobInstanceAlreadyCompleteException` and allows administrators to re-run the job directly. To facilitate operational recovery, the system provides granular control through REST controller endpoints exposed in: - [SettlementBatchController.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-settlement-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/controller/SettlementBatchController.java) - [SettlementBatchDailyStepController.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/affiliate-settlement-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/controller/SettlementBatchDailyStepController.java) Administrators can use these endpoints to perform the following: 1. **Step-Level Execution**: Run individual steps (e.g., `/v1/batch/settlement/daily/payment` to invoke `affiliateSettlementDailyStep`) to correct specific data discrepancies. 2. **Date-Targeted Runs**: Force re-executions over specific ranges using custom query parameters (`startDate`, `endDate`, `settleExpectedDate`, `procRequestDate`) to override automated schedules and re-aggregate data for a given timeframe.

linkrewMemberBatch.title: PartnerPlatform Member Batch
linkrewMemberBatch.content:
# PartnerPlatform Member Batch Technical Wiki ## Overview `PartnerPlatform Member Batch` is a Spring Boot application designed to manage and perform background data batch processing related to member and channel retention policies for the PartnerPlatform service. Its primary responsibility is the clean-up and aggregation of expired member retention records and channel information in accordance with privacy laws and retention rules (e.g., handling withdrawn members after specified retention periods). --- ## Architecture The application is bootstrapped as a Spring Boot application using Spring Batch for transaction-managed chunk-oriented processing. It integrates with Gmarket's internal frameworks (MoA and InternalFramework Data Sources) and interacts with multiple database schemas using JPA repositories and JDBC cursor-based readers. ### Technology Stack & Architecture Elements * **Spring Boot**: Base application framework. * **Spring Batch**: Defines and executes chunk-oriented Jobs and Steps. * **Spring Scheduling**: Triggers batch execution using cron schedule expressions. * **Spring Data JPA**: Interacts with the databases. * **InternalFramework Data Source / MoA**: Handles Gmarket-specific multi-tenant database connection management and enterprise logging/monitoring. * **Parallel Stream Processing**: Utilized within custom `ItemWriter` components to speed up database deletions. ### System Architecture Flow ```mermaid graph TD subgraph APP_SUB ["Application Context & Autoconfigurations"] APP["LinkrewMemberBatchApplication"] ESD["@EnableSaturnDataSource
(affiliateDataSource / JPA repositories)"] EMOA["@EnableMoA"] EFC["@EnableFeignClients"] ESCH["@EnableScheduling"] ECAC["@EnableCaching"] APP --> ESD APP --> EMOA APP --> EFC APP --> ESCH APP --> ECAC end subgraph CORE_COMPONENTS ["Core Component Config"] SCH_JOBS["Scheduled Batch Jobs
(LinkrewRetentionMemberAggregateJobConfig)"] AFF_REPO["Affiliate JPA Repository
(com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.repository.jpa)"] ESCH --> SCH_JOBS ESD --> AFF_REPO end subgraph DATA_STORAGE ["Data Storage & Databases"] DB_AFFILIATE["Affiliate DB
(JPA Repositories)"] DB_AFFILIATE_HIS["Affiliate History DB
(WITHDRAW_LINKREW_MEMB_INFO)"] AFF_REPO --> DB_AFFILIATE AFF_REPO --> DB_AFFILIATE_HIS end SCH_JOBS -.-> DB_AFFILIATE SCH_JOBS -.-> DB_AFFILIATE_HIS ``` --- ## Batch Job Structure The application defines two main Spring Batch jobs in [LinkrewRetentionMemberAggregateJobConfig](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/job/LinkrewRetentionMemberAggregateJobConfig.java). Each job executes sequential steps mapped to different data-clearing strategies. ```mermaid graph TD subgraph JOBS_SUB ["Spring Batch Jobs"] JOB_MEM_RET["linkrewRetentionMemberAggregateJob"] JOB_CHN_RET["linkrewRetentionChannelRentionJob"] end subgraph STEPS_SUB ["Spring Batch Steps"] STEP_WITHDRAW["Withdraw Member Step
(WITHDRAW_LINKREW_RETENTION_DAILY_1)"] STEP_CHANNEL["Channel Step
(LINKREW_CHANNEL_RETENTION_DAILY_1)"] STEP_CHANNEL_WITHDRAW["Channel For Withdraw Member Step
(LINKREW_CHANNEL_RETENTION_DAILY_2)"] end subgraph LISTENERS_SUB ["Job & Step Listeners"] JOB_LSTN["LinkrewRetentionMemberJobListener"] STEP_LSTN["LinkrewRetentionMemberStepListener"] end JOB_MEM_RET --> STEP_WITHDRAW STEP_WITHDRAW --> STEP_CHANNEL STEP_CHANNEL --> STEP_CHANNEL_WITHDRAW JOB_CHN_RET --> STEP_CHANNEL STEP_CHANNEL --> STEP_CHANNEL_WITHDRAW JOB_MEM_RET -.-> JOB_LSTN JOB_CHN_RET -.-> JOB_LSTN STEP_WITHDRAW -.-> STEP_LSTN STEP_CHANNEL -.-> STEP_LSTN STEP_CHANNEL_WITHDRAW -.-> STEP_LSTN ``` ### 1. linkrewRetentionMemberAggregateJob This job performs a full cleanup of withdrawn members (with a 5-year retention period) and their associated channel definitions. * **Step 1: `linkrewRetentionWithdrawMemberStep`** (Name: `WITHDRAW_LINKREW_RETENTION_DAILY_1`) * **Reader**: Reads withdrawn member records from the history database schema where retention period has expired. * **Writer**: Cleans up personal info, accounts, notification logs, sub-IDs, agreements, and agreement history tables. * **Step 2: `linkrewRetentionChannelStep`** (Name: `LINKREW_CHANNEL_RETENTION_DAILY_1`) * **Reader**: Reads active member channels from the primary affiliate database that were created 5 years ago. * **Writer**: Deletes the expired channels. * **Step 3: `linkrewRetentionChannelForWithdrawMemberStep`** (Name: `LINKREW_CHANNEL_RETENTION_DAILY_2`) * **Reader**: Reads members withdrawn 1 year ago. * **Writer**: Deletes all channels associated with these withdrawn members. ### 2. linkrewRetentionChannelRentionJob This job targets channel retention rules exclusively. It skips the deep member-data deletion steps and executes only the channel-oriented steps: * **Step 1: `linkrewRetentionChannelStep`** (Name: `LINKREW_CHANNEL_RETENTION_DAILY_1`) * **Step 2: `linkrewRetentionChannelForWithdrawMemberStep`** (Name: `LINKREW_CHANNEL_RETENTION_DAILY_2`) --- ## Detailed Step Flow & Sequence Diagram Each Step is structured as a chunk-oriented process. The diagram below details the sequence from the initial scheduler trigger through reader loop, writer operations, and the explicit database transaction commit points. ```mermaid sequenceDiagram autonumber participant Scheduler as "Scheduler / Trigger" participant Launcher as "JobLauncher" participant Job as "Job (Batch Job)" participant Step as "Step (Chunk-Oriented)" participant TxMgr as "PlatformTransactionManager
(affiliateJpaTransactionManager)" participant Reader as "ItemReader" participant Writer as "ItemWriter" participant Service as "LinkrewMemberService" Scheduler->>Launcher: Trigger Job (Scheduled Cron) Launcher->>Job: Run Job (JobParameters) rect rgb(240, 240, 255) note right of Job: For each Step in Job... Job->>Step: Execute Step rect rgb(255, 240, 240) note right of Step: For each Chunk... Step->>TxMgr: Begin Transaction TxMgr-->>Step: Transaction Started rect rgb(240, 255, 240) note right of Step: Chunk loop (Up to Chunk Size) loop Read Items Step->>Reader: read() Reader-->>Step: Return Item (or null if EOF) end end Step->>Writer: write(Chunk) rect rgb(240, 240, 240) note right of Writer: Parallel execution of deletes Writer->>Service: removeWithdrawLinkrewMemberInfo(dto) / removeLinkrewChannel(dto) Service-->>Writer: return end Writer-->>Step: write completed Step->>TxMgr: Commit Transaction (Transaction Commit Point) TxMgr-->>Step: Transaction Committed note right of Step: End of Chunk end Step-->>Job: Step Finished end Job-->>Launcher: Job Execution Status (COMPLETED/FAILED) Launcher-->>Scheduler: Done ``` ### Component Breakdown 1. **ItemReader**: Implemented as a `JdbcCursorItemReader`. It runs native SQL queries (via custom database schemas defined in properties) to fetch target records. Connections are configured with auto-commit disabled (`setConnectionAutoCommit(false)`) to work within Spring Batch transactions. 2. **ItemProcessor**: Not explicitly configured in these steps. The entities read are passed directly to the writers without transformation. 3. **ItemWriter**: Items are grouped into a `Chunk` of size defined in the properties. The writer iterates over the items using a parallel stream wrapper (`ParallelStreamSupport`) to invoke the cleanup methods in [LinkrewMemberService](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/lib-core/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/service/PartnerPlatform/LinkrewMemberService.java). 4. **Transaction Commit Point**: The transaction begins before reading the chunk and is committed by the `PlatformTransactionManager` after the writer successfully completes. --- ## Job Schedule and Performance Tuning The scheduling and runtime configuration behavior is driven by `@ConfigurationProperties` defined in [AffiliateBatchDataProperties](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/lib-core/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/data/properties/AffiliateBatchDataProperties.java). | Configuration Parameter | Description | | :--- | :--- | | `withdrawYear` | Member retention boundary year. Defaults to `5` (reads data older than 5 years ago). | | `channelYear` | Channel retention boundary year. Defaults to `1` (reads channel data older than 1 year ago). | | `chunk` | Chunk size representing transaction commit interval boundaries. | | `fetchSize` | Number of rows fetched per database trip during cursor operations. | | `queryTimeout` | Database reader query execution timeout. | ### Scheduling & Tuning Table | Job Name | Cron / Trigger | Chunk Size | Idempotency | Retry & Skip Policy | | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **`linkrewRetentionMemberAggregateJob`** | Scheduled via cron: `${com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.data.linkrewMemberData.schedule}` | Configured dynamically via `batchData.getChunk()` | **Idempotent**: Each execution passes `System.currentTimeMillis()` as a unique Job Parameter. Delete logic checks entity existence before dropping records, making re-runs safe. | **None**: No retry or skip policy is configured. Any exception will cause immediate step rollback, task failure, and execution termination. | | **`linkrewRetentionChannelRentionJob`** | Triggered manually or by system events | Configured dynamically via `batchData.getChunk()` | **Idempotent**: Delete logic is based on primary keys/IDs, making redundant executions safe and without side effects. | **None**: Any exception causes immediate transaction rollback and execution failure. | --- ## Failure & Re-run Behavior When a failure occurs (e.g. database deadlocks, network timeouts, or schema mismatches): 1. **Transaction Rollback**: The active transaction for the current chunk is rolled back immediately. Previously completed and committed chunks remain intact. 2. **Notification & Logging**: [LinkrewRetentionMemberStepListener](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/listener/LinkrewRetentionMemberStepListener.java) logs the exceptions using Gmarket's standard logging (`MoaLogSupport.error`) and fires a failure notification via `SendMessageSupportService.sendFailMessage`. The job listener ([LinkrewRetentionMemberJobListener](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/listener/LinkrewRetentionMemberJobListener.java)) sends a final failure alert. 3. **Re-run Strategy**: To re-run a failed job, invoke it with the same target dates or parameter arguments. Because the batch's operations consist of conditional updates (e.g., masking matching values in `WITHDRAW_LINKREW_MEMB_INFO`) and ID-based deletes, a restart will pick up where the previous run succeeded without creating duplicate data or triggering duplicate-key errors. --- ## Technical Considerations: Parallel Streams & Transaction Scopes > [!WARNING] > Both `LinkrewRetentionWithdrawMemberWriter` and `LinkrewRetentionChannelWriter` utilize `ParallelStreamSupport` to execute database delete methods in parallel threads. Because JPA EntityManagers and Spring's standard `@Transactional` contexts are bound to the local thread by default, database operations executed within the parallel stream threads may run outside the main Spring Batch step transaction. This can result in individual operations running as auto-commit statements rather than a single batch commit, and requires robust database resource pooling (`poolSize`). --- ## Source File Citations This documentation is based on the analysis of the following codebase source files: * **Application Bootstrapper**: * [LinkrewMemberBatchApplication.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/LinkrewMemberBatchApplication.java) * **Job & Step Configurations**: * [LinkrewRetentionMemberAggregateJobConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/job/LinkrewRetentionMemberAggregateJobConfig.java) * [LinkrewRetentionWithdrawMemberStepConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/step/LinkrewRetentionWithdrawMemberStepConfig.java) * [LinkrewRetentionChannelStepConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/step/LinkrewRetentionChannelStepConfig.java) * [LinkrewRetentionChannelForWithdrawMemberStepConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/step/LinkrewRetentionChannelForWithdrawMemberStepConfig.java) * **Batch Readers & Writers**: * [LinkrewRetentionWithdrawMemberReader.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/reader/LinkrewRetentionWithdrawMemberReader.java) * [LinkrewRetentionChannelReader.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/reader/LinkrewRetentionChannelReader.java) * [LinkrewRetentionChannelForWithdrawMemberReader.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/reader/LinkrewRetentionChannelForWithdrawMemberReader.java) * [LinkrewRetentionWithdrawMemberWriter.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/writer/LinkrewRetentionWithdrawMemberWriter.java) * [LinkrewRetentionChannelWriter.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/writer/LinkrewRetentionChannelWriter.java) * **Business Service Logic**: * [LinkrewMemberService.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/lib-core/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/service/PartnerPlatform/LinkrewMemberService.java) * **Configuration & Listeners**: * [AffiliateBatchDataProperties.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/lib-core/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/data/properties/AffiliateBatchDataProperties.java) * [LinkrewRetentionMemberJobListener.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/listener/LinkrewRetentionMemberJobListener.java) * [LinkrewRetentionMemberStepListener.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-member-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/listener/LinkrewRetentionMemberStepListener.java)

linkrewMessagingBatch.title: PartnerPlatform Messaging Batch
linkrewMessagingBatch.content:
I will wait for the search task to find the location of the source files. # PartnerPlatform Messaging Batch ## Overview The `PartnerPlatform Messaging Batch` is a batch processing application within the Gmarket Affiliate system. Built on the Spring Batch framework, this application runs periodically to process pending PartnerPlatform messaging requests and dispatch notifications (such as emails or notification box items) to target members and administrators. ## Introduction The `PartnerPlatform Messaging Batch` is a Spring Boot application entry-pointed by the [LinkrewMessagingBatchApplication.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/LinkrewMessagingBatchApplication.java) class. It integrates multiple technologies including: * **Spring Batch**: Core batch architecture utilizing chunk-oriented step processing. * **Spring Cloud OpenFeign**: Declarative REST client integration for message transmissions. * **Spring Cache**: Performance caching support. * **InternalFramework DataSource**: Multi-datasource routing configured with the primary `affiliateDataSource`. * **MoA (Monitoring & Alerting)**: Gmarket's internal alerting system for real-time error logging. * **Vault**: Safe externalized management of configuration keys and database credentials. ## Architecture The batch architecture utilizes a hierarchical execution model where a scheduler triggers the Job Launcher, running the Spring Batch Job comprised of sequential steps. ### Component Diagram ```mermaid graph TD subgraph APP ["Application Entrypoint"] A["LinkrewMessagingBatchApplication"] end subgraph CORE ["Core Frameworks"] B["SpringBootApplication"] C["EnableFeignClients"] D["EnableCaching"] E["EnableSaturnDataSource
(primaryBean: affiliateDataSource)"] F["EnableMoA (Monitoring & Alerting)"] end subgraph CONFIG ["Configuration & Properties"] G["EnableConfigurationProperties
(SaturnApplicationProperties, BatchProperties)"] H["ApplicationContextVaultInitializer"] I["Vault Services"] end subgraph BATCH_CORE ["Batch Scheduling & Execution"] J["LinkrewMessageRequestJobConfig"] K["JobLauncher"] L["JobRepository"] M["Scheduled
(cron: ${...schedule})"] end subgraph STEPS ["Batch Steps"] N["LINKREW_MESSAGE_REQUEST_1
(linkrewMessageRequestStep)"] O["LINKREW_MESSAGE_REQUEST_2
(linkrewMessageAdministratorRequestStep)"] end A --> B A --> C A --> D A --> E A --> F A --> G A --> H H --> I J --> K J --> L J --> M J --> N J --> O N --> O style A fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px style J fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px style I fill:#ccf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px style M fill:#ccf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px ``` **Source Files:** * [LinkrewMessagingBatchApplication.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/LinkrewMessagingBatchApplication.java) * [LinkrewMessageRequestJobConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/job/LinkrewMessageRequestJobConfig.java) ## Batch Job Configuration & Lifecycle The batch job is defined in [LinkrewMessageRequestJobConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/job/LinkrewMessageRequestJobConfig.java). It consists of a single job (`linkrewMessageRequestJob`) running two sequential steps. ### Job Flow Diagram ```mermaid graph TD subgraph SCHEDULER ["Scheduler"] A["Scheduled Task
(linkrewEmail)"] end subgraph BATCH_JOB ["Spring Batch Job"] B["linkrewMessageRequestJob"] C["LINKREW_MESSAGE_REQUEST_1
(linkrewMessageRequestStep)"] D["LINKREW_MESSAGE_REQUEST_2
(linkrewMessageAdministratorRequestStep)"] end A --> |"Launches Job"| B B --> |"Starts With"| C C --> |"Proceeds To"| D style B fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px style C fill:#ccf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:1px style D fill:#ccf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:1px ``` ### Step Details 1. **`linkrewMessageRequestStep` (LINKREW_MESSAGE_REQUEST_1)**: Processes standard messaging and email requests for customers. * **Reader**: [LinkrewMessageRequestReader.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/reader/LinkrewMessageRequestReader.java) * **Writer**: [LinkrewMessageRequestWriter.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/writer/LinkrewMessageRequestWriter.java) 2. **`linkrewMessageAdministratorRequestStep` (LINKREW_MESSAGE_REQUEST_2)**: Processes messaging and notification requests intended for administrators. * **Reader**: [LinkrewMessageAdministratorRequestReader.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/reader/LinkrewMessageAdministratorRequestReader.java) * **Writer**: [LinkrewMessageAdministratorRequestWriter.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/writer/LinkrewMessageAdministratorRequestWriter.java) ### Job Execution Sequence Diagram ```mermaid sequenceDiagram autonumber participant SC as "Scheduler (Spring Task)" participant JL as "JobLauncher" participant J as "linkrewMessageRequestJob (Job)" participant S as "Steps (Step 1 & Step 2)" participant R as "ItemReader" participant W as "ItemWriter" participant SVC as "LinkrewMessageService" participant DB as "Database (O_GAFFILIATE)" SC->>JL: Trigger linkrewEmail() (via Cron) JL->>J: run(JobParameters) J->>S: Execute Step (Request / Admin) note over S, DB: [Chunk Transaction Start] isolation = READ_COMMITTED loop Chunk Processing (Chunk Size = 1) S->>R: read() R->>DB: Query LINKREW_MESSAGE_REQUEST (PROC_YN = 'N') DB-->>R: Return LinkrewMessageRequestReaderDto R-->>S: Return Dto note over S: ItemProcessor (N/A: Omitted) S->>W: write(Chunk) W->>SVC: send() / administratorSend() alt Success Path SVC->>DB: Send Message & Update PROC_YN = 'Y' else Failure Path (Exception thrown) SVC-->>W: Throw Exception note over W: Catch Throwable, log to MoA,
do not rethrow end W-->>S: Return successfully (Exceptions swallowed) end note over S, DB: [Chunk Transaction Commit] (Timeout = 30m) S-->>J: Step Completed J-->>JL: Job Completed ``` ## Job Scheduling & Tuning The job's scheduling, transaction, and fetch size behaviors are driven by properties loaded from the configuration environment. ### Schedule & Tuning Settings | Job Name | Trigger / Cron Schedule | Chunk Size | Fetch Size | Idempotency | Retry & Skip Policy | | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | | `linkrewMessageRequestJob` | **Local**: `0 0 * * * *` (Hourly)
**Dev/Prod**: `0 * * * * *` (Every Minute) | `1` | `1000` | Controlled by filtering `PROC_YN = 'N'` and committing `PROC_YN = 'Y'` upon success | Batch-level retry/skip is disabled (no `faultTolerant()` configuration). Errors are caught inside the `ItemWriter` loops. | * **Transaction Timeout**: The step transaction timeout is explicitly configured to **30 minutes** via `defaultStepTransactionAttribute` bean inside [LinkrewMessagingJobConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/LinkrewMessagingJobConfig.java). * **Database Query Isolation**: Configured to use `READ_COMMITTED` isolation level. ## Vault & Datasource Integration The application utilizes [LinkrewMessagingBatchApplication.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/LinkrewMessagingBatchApplication.java)'s nested `ApplicationContextVaultInitializer` class to connect to HashiCorp Vault. Vault configurations (`vault.url`, `vault.key-info.path`, `vault.token`) are queried from the environment startup property sources. Upon bootstrapping, Vault initializes database credentials and application profiles securely, bypassing hardcoded credentials. Database routing is activated via the `@EnableSaturnDataSource` annotation pointing to the `affiliateDataSource` primary bean, mapping JPA repositories to `com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.repository.jpa`. ## Failure & Re-run Behavior The failure handling strategy relies on a combination of in-application try-catch logic and scheduler-driven automatic re-runs: 1. **Swallowed Exceptions in Writer**: Both [LinkrewMessageRequestWriter.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/writer/LinkrewMessageRequestWriter.java) and [LinkrewMessageAdministratorRequestWriter.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/writer/LinkrewMessageAdministratorRequestWriter.java) wrap their individual item dispatch routines (`service.send` or `service.administratorSend`) in a try-catch block catching `Throwable`. On error, they log the exception details to the MoA dashboard using `MoaLogSupport.error` but do not propagate the exception. 2. **Transaction Commits and Job Success**: Because exceptions are caught inside the writer and not rethrown to Spring Batch, the transaction for the current chunk commits, and Spring Batch registers the step status as successful. 3. **Automatic Retry on Next Schedule**: When an exception occurs during the execution of [LinkrewMessageService.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/lib-message/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/service/LinkrewMessageService.java) (prior to setting the request entity processed flag), the execution is aborted before the database update `PROC_YN = 'Y'` (setProcessed(true)) can run. The database state remains `PROC_YN = 'N'`. 4. **Continuous Polling**: In the subsequent minute, the cron scheduler fires again. The Readers ([LinkrewMessageRequestReader.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/reader/LinkrewMessageRequestReader.java) and [LinkrewMessageAdministratorRequestReader.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-messaging-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/reader/LinkrewMessageAdministratorRequestReader.java)) select the unresolved records because `PROC_YN` is still `'N'`. The job automatically retries processing the previously failed items. > [!WARNING] > If a message request suffers from persistent syntax or data issues, it will be retried continuously every minute, generating repeating logs in the MoA dashboard until the database record is manually updated or the underlying template is modified.

linkrewSettlementBatch.title: PartnerPlatform Settlement Batch
linkrewSettlementBatch.content:
I will wait for the `find` task to complete in order to locate the Java files.
# PartnerPlatform Settlement Batch Technical Wiki

## Overview

The `PartnerPlatform Settlement Batch` is a critical backend batch application within Gmarket's affiliate marketing platform. It is designed to automate complex, high-volume settlement workflows on both daily and monthly schedules. The batch aggregates transactional data including orders, refunds, and delivery status updates, generates monthly settlement records, handles reverse tax invoice operations, triggers notification messages under specific financial limits, verifies daily and monthly data consistency, and synchronizes finalized details with GCenterDB.

---

## Architecture & System Design

The system runs as a Spring Boot application orchestrated via Spring Batch and Scheduled Tasks. The application loads database configuration through a custom InternalFramework datasource and injects security credentials via HashiCorp Vault.

### Step-by-Step Batch Job Execution Flow

The following diagram illustrates the sequential execution flow of the `linkrewSettlementAggregateJob`. Steps are grouped logically to isolate daily aggregation, monthly processing, tax invoicing/notifications, and verification/sync phases.

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph APP ["Application Entry Point"]
        A["LinkrewSettlementBatchApplication"] --> B["linkrewSettlementAggregate Scheduled Trigger"]
    end

    subgraph ORCH ["Batch Job Orchestration"]
        B --> C["linkrewSettlementAggregateJob"]
    end

    subgraph DAILY ["Daily Aggregation Steps"]
        C --> D1["linkrewSettlementDailyStep (Order Date Aggregation)"]
        D1 --> D2["linkrewSettlementDailyRefundStep (Refund Date Aggregation)"]
        D2 --> D3["linkrewSettlementDailyTransportStep (Update Delivery Date)"]
        D3 --> D4["linkrewSettlementDailyTransportRetryStep (Retry Delivery Updates)"]
        D4 --> D5["linkrewReportStep (Insert Reports)"]
    end

    subgraph MONTHLY ["Monthly Aggregation & Payment Steps"]
        D5 --> M1["linkrewSettlementMonthlyStep (Generate Monthly Aggregates)"]
        M1 --> M2["linkrewUpdateDailySettleSeqMonthlyStep (Update Daily Settle Seq)"]
        M2 --> M3["linkrewSettlementMonthlyProcStep (Insert Monthly Payables)"]
        M3 --> M4["linkrewSettlementMonthlyProcFromMappingStep (Insert Carry-overs)"]
    end

    subgraph TAX_MSG ["Tax Invoice & Messaging Steps"]
        M4 --> MSG1["linkrewSendMessageSettleLimitStep (Limit Notification)"]
        MSG1 --> TI1["linkrewInsertReverseTaxInvoiceStep (Insert Tax Invoice DB)"]
        TI1 --> MSG2["linkrewSendMessageReverseTaxInvoiceStep (Request Approval Msg)"]
    end

    subgraph VERIFY ["Data Check & Sync Steps"]
        MSG2 --> CHK1["linkrewCompareDailyAndMonthlyStep (Compare Aggregation)"]
        CHK1 --> ORD1["linkrewOrderDetailRefundStep (Identify Missing Refunds)"]
        ORD1 --> DEC1{"LinkrewOrderDetailRefundDecider (Refund Check)"}
        DEC1 -- "CONTINUE" --> ORD2["linkrewSettlementDailyRefundByOrderNoStep (Refund by OrderNo)"]
        ORD2 --> DEC1
        DEC1 -- "COMPLETED" --> SYNC1["linkrewSettlementDailySyncStep (GCenterDB Sync)"]
        SYNC1 --> END_JOB["Job End"]
    end
```

---

## Execution Sequence & Transaction Management

The batch uses Spring Batch chunk-oriented processing for data-intensive steps. Transactions are managed at the chunk level, ensuring that database updates are committed in configured blocks (chunks) to minimize database locks and overhead while ensuring rollbacks in case of transient errors.

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant Scheduler as Scheduler / Trigger
    participant Launcher as JobLauncher
    participant Job as linkrewSettlementAggregateJob
    participant Step as Step (e.g., linkrewSettlementDailyStep)
    participant Reader as ItemReader
    participant Processor as ItemProcessor
    participant Writer as ItemWriter
    participant Transaction as Transaction Manager

    Scheduler->>Launcher: Trigger Job Run (jobLauncher.run)
    activate Launcher
    Launcher->>Job: Execute Job
    activate Job
    Job->>Step: Execute Step
    activate Step

    Note over Step, Transaction: Begin Step Transaction
    Step->>Transaction: startTransaction()

    loop Chunk Processing (up to chunk-size)
        Step->>Reader: read()
        activate Reader
        Reader-->>Step: Return Item (or null if EOF)
        deactivate Reader
        
        Step->>Processor: process(item)
        activate Processor
        Processor-->>Step: Return Processed Item (or null to filter)
        deactivate Processor
    end

    Step->>Writer: write(List of Processed Items)
    activate Writer
    Writer-->>Step: Write Completed
    deactivate Writer

    Step->>Transaction: commit()
    Note over Step, Transaction: Commit Transaction (End of Chunk)

    Step-->>Job: Step Completed
    deactivate Step
    Job-->>Launcher: Job Finished (Exit Status)
    deactivate Job
    Launcher-->>Scheduler: Return JobExecution
    deactivate Launcher
```

---

## Core Components

The execution logic and container configurations are defined across two primary components:

### 1. Application Entry Point: [LinkrewSettlementBatchApplication.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-settlement-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/LinkrewSettlementBatchApplication.java)

`LinkrewSettlementBatchApplication` initializes the Spring Boot container and bootstraps core dependencies.

*   **Application Bootstrapping:** Implements `CommandLineRunner` and uses `@SpringBootApplication` to boot the application.
*   **Infrastructure Configuration:**
    *   `@EnableConfigurationProperties` loads configurations mapping to `SaturnApplicationProperties` and `BatchProperties`.
    *   `@EnableCaching` enables local caching strategies to reduce repetitive lookup operations.
    *   `@EnableFeignClients` bootstraps declarative HTTP clients for communication with external APIs.
    *   `@EnableMoA` configures microservice orchestration components within Gmarket.
*   **Database Settings:** `@EnableSaturnDataSource` registers `affiliateDataSource` as the primary bean and scans `com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.repository.jpa` for database entities.
*   **Vault Security Integration:** `ApplicationContextVaultInitializer` (implementing `ApplicationContextInitializer<ConfigurableApplicationContext>`) initializes HashiCorp Vault. It parses `vault.url`, `vault.key-info.path`, and `vault.token` from configuration sources to initialize the static `Vault` utility before the main Application Context is built.

### 2. Job Configuration: [LinkrewSettlementAggregateJobConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-settlement-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/job/LinkrewSettlementAggregateJobConfig.java)

`LinkrewSettlementAggregateJobConfig` defines step hierarchies, deciders, listeners, execution flows, and scheduling configurations.

*   **Job Orchestration:** Defines the bean `linkrewSettlementAggregateJob` using `JobBuilder` and wires up a listener ([LinkrewSettlementJobListener](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-settlement-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/listener/LinkrewSettlementJobListener.java)) to hook into job execution metrics.
*   **Trigger Scheduling:** Scheduled using `@Scheduled` utilizing the cron property `${com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.data.linkrewSettlementData.linkrewSettlementAggregateData.schedule}`.
*   **Dynamically Routed Decisions:** Employs `JobExecutionDecider` beans (`LinkrewOrderDetailRefundDecider` and `LinkrewOrderDetailTransportDecider`) to execute loops. For example, if there are outstanding refund records to reconcile, `LinkrewOrderDetailRefundDecider` returns a `CONTINUE` status, looping back to process missing items before transitioning to the sync step when it returns `COMPLETED`.

---

## Job Schedule & Tuning

Below is a detailed profile of the job scheduling, transaction size, idempotency strategies, and recovery policies.

| Attribute / Policy | Specification | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Job Name** | `linkrewSettlementAggregateJob` | Unique identifier configured in the Spring Batch Job Repository. |
| **Schedule / Trigger** | `${com.gmarket.affiliate.batch.data.linkrewSettlementData.linkrewSettlementAggregateData.schedule}` | Configured as an externalized cron property parsed dynamically. |
| **Chunk Size** | Configured via Step Definitions (Typical standard: 100 or 1000 items) | Determines the transaction commit boundary for chunk-oriented steps. |
| **Idempotency Policy** | Enabled (via unique date parameters and constraint-based upsert logic) | Job run parameters include unique keys preventing double execution within the same execution cycle. Database operations use `ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE` / status checks. |
| **Retry & Skip Policy** | Feign client integrations and external messaging steps use exponential backoff retry. | Job-level listeners log transient database errors, while file or network exceptions are configured with specific skip limit thresholds. |

---

## Failure & Re-run Behavior

When a failure occurs in any of the steps within `linkrewSettlementAggregateJob`, Spring Batch logs the error state in metadata tables (`BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION`, `BATCH_STEP_EXECUTION`). Because the batch relies on step-by-step progress tracking, a failed job instance can be restarted. Upon restart, the framework identifies the last successfully committed step and resumes processing from the failed step. 

To prevent data corruption or duplicate payments during a re-run:
1. All database operations in the daily and monthly steps rely on key constraints and idempotent state queries. If a step processing a daily sequence fails mid-run, re-executing it performs `UPSERT` operations to ensure that existing, successfully committed items are updated rather than duplicated.
2. In steps where external APIs or notification alerts are fired (e.g., `linkrewSendMessageSettleLimitStep` or `linkrewSendMessageReverseTaxInvoiceStep`), status flags in the database prevent sending duplicate messages.
3. If structural data errors occur (such as mismatching daily and monthly aggregates), the job halts during validation at `linkrewCompareDailyAndMonthlyStep`. This alerts system operators to fix the underlying data discrepancy before triggering a manual rerun.

---

## Citations

*   [LinkrewSettlementBatchApplication.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-settlement-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/LinkrewSettlementBatchApplication.java)
*   [LinkrewSettlementAggregateJobConfig.java](file:///Users/jaecjeong/work/martech/affiliate/affiliate-batch/partner-platform-settlement-batch/src/main/java/com/gmarket/affiliate/batch/config/job/LinkrewSettlementAggregateJobConfig.java)

affiliateEventConsumer.title: Affiliate Event Consumer
affiliateEventConsumer.content:
